The Menu (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $38,501,125Details
International Box Office $41,127,075
Worldwide Box Office $79,628,200
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $675,392
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $817,669
Total $1,493,061
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Set in the world of high-end culinary culture, a young couple visits an exclusive destination restaurant on a remote island where the acclaimed chef has prepared a lavish tasting menu, along with some shocking surprises.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,004,957 (23.4% of total gross)
Legs:4.28 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:48.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,211 opening theaters/3,228 max. theaters, 5.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $41,241,169

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 18th, 2022 (Wide) by Searchlight Pictures
International Releases: November 16th, 2022 (Wide) (Philippines)
November 17th, 2022 (Wide) (Switzerland)
November 17th, 2022 (Wide) (Malaysia)
November 17th, 2022 (Wide) (Singapore)
November 17th, 2022 (Wide) (Denmark)
Video Release: January 3rd, 2023 by Searchlight Pictures
MPA Rating: R for strong/disturbing violent content, language throughout and some sexual references.
(Rating bulletin 2732 (cert #53796), 5/18/2022)
Running Time: 107 minutes
Plot point: Food, Restaurants, Surprise Twist
Subgenre: Black Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Black Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Searchlight Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
